Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance in version tracking and updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling for timestamps.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and speed when displaying time-related information.

Removed_Camera/UI.name: FFlagPeoplePageCardMenuUseVisibleProperty_Staged
Removed_Camera/UI.mechanism: Enables the use of a visibility property for menu cards on the people page.
Removed_Camera/UI.purpose: Allows for a cleaner and more organized display of user options and interactions.

Added_Network.name: FStringNetStackDummyClientEnabledMinorVersions_Staged
Added_Network.mechanism: Enables testing of network stack features with dummy clients.
Added_Network.purpose: Improves network reliability and performance for players.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Allows the system to dynamically reference the current version of the codebase.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and fixes in real-time.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Adjusts how timestamps are formatted in dynamic strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the readability and accuracy of time-related information for players.
